_note: Evaluation set for the finance RAG demo. in_scope = answerable from finance-handbook.md (retrieval must surface the right passage). out_of_scope = NOT in the doc (the guardrail must refuse).

in_scope.q: What are the standard payment terms?
When is an invoice considered overdue?
How are duplicate vendor bills handled?
What is the deadline to submit an expense claim?
How long do refunds take to process?
When must the month-end close be finished?
What file formats are accepted for client data?
What day are payment runs scheduled?

out_of_scope.q: What is the company's vacation and leave policy?
How do I reset my email password?
What health insurance plan does the company offer?
Who won the football game last night?
